title: Iran war: Oil prices rise as traders eye fragile ceasefire deal
description: The cost of crude plunged on Wednesday after a deal was announced that includes the opening of the Strait of Hormuz.
content:
Global oil prices rose in Asian morning trade on Thursday as investors watch developments in the fragile US-Iran ceasefire.

title: PSG ramp up the style to leave Slot and Liverpool looking like yesterday’s men
description: Another Anfield miracle in the second leg will be talked up, but the gulf in class between the two sides was undeniable
content: These are strange times for Liverpool Football Club, still, and until anyone specifically says otherwise, the champions of England. It is a mark of where the team is that on an oddly tension-free night in Paris there were reasons to be pleased, but a... [4681 chars]

title: Gnome unknowns: Masters chair Ridley in dark about ornaments’ Augusta future
description: The Masters gnome drama has taken another twist after the chairman of Augusta National admitted he is in the dark as to the must-have item’s future
content: The Masters gnome drama has taken another twist after the chair of Augusta National admitted he is in the dark as to the must-have items’ future. Fred Ridley has repeatedly asked whether 2026 will be the final year ­for gnomes being on sale – as has ... [1606 chars]

title: Arne Slot says Liverpool ‘need our fans’ to help turn PSG tie around at Anfield
description: Arne Slot said Liverpool will need to drastically raise their game in the second leg at Anfield after going into ‘survival mode’ for defeat in Paris
content:
Arne Slot admitted Liverpool were in survival mode against Paris Saint-Germain and will need the backing of Anfield to raise their level against the European champions in next week’s Champions League quarter-final second leg.
